misc.title: 【✨新連載『聖闘士星矢 天界篇』ついに始動✨】 5月14日(木)発売の #週刊少年チャンピオン 24号は全世界待望の新連載『聖闘士星矢 天界篇』が表紙&巻頭カラーで登場 🎊 車田正美先生が描く『聖闘士星矢』『聖闘士星矢NEXT DIMENDION冥王神話』の正統続編が開幕‼️歴史的第一話を見逃すな🚀 付録には大迫力の両面BIG銀河神話ポスターも⚡️🔥 #聖闘士星矢天界篇 #車田正美
misc.text: 【✨新連載『聖闘士星矢 天界篇』ついに始動✨】 5月14日(木)発売の #週刊少年チャンピオン 24号は全世界待望の新連載『聖闘士星矢 天界篇』が表紙&巻頭カラーで登場 🎊 車田正美先生が描く『聖闘士星矢』『聖闘士星矢NEXT DIMENDION冥王神話』の正統続編が開幕‼️歴史的第一話を見逃すな🚀 付録には大迫力の両面BIG銀河神話ポスターも⚡️🔥 #聖闘士星矢天界篇 #車田正美

misc.title: Jazz musician Yuji Ohno passed away peacefully on May 4 at 84 years old due to old age. Debuting in the 1960's, he has since produced many works and is most famous for composing for the Lupin III seri
misc.text: Jazz musician Yuji Ohno passed away peacefully on May 4 at 84 years old due to old age. Debuting in the 1960's, he has since produced many works and is most famous for composing for the Lupin III series. Space Adventure Cobra, The Inugami Family, Proof of the Man, Nebula Mask Machineman, and many more series were composed by Ohno. oricon.co.jp/news/2454293/fu…

misc.title: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a br
misc.text: I think we don’t Credit Ikemoto🐐enough for his designs. I don’t think there are Mangaka who put such thoughts into their designs like Ikemoto🐐 does. Designing fused Momoshiki black and white as a bridge between white and black people is a huge symbol against racism!❤️ #BORUTO

misc.title: It’s not looking good for BoruSara shippers. If you look at both Sarada’s and Kawaki’s eye you can see that if you overlap those eyes they fill their empty space completely. And we know Ikemoto loves
misc.text: It’s not looking good for BoruSara shippers. If you look at both Sarada’s and Kawaki’s eye you can see that if you overlap those eyes they fill their empty space completely. And we know Ikemoto loves symbolism. KawaSara is possible to become the canon ship… #BORUTO

misc.title: And before you start saying I am an ungrateful person: I’m not, I just want something more for the 10 years anniversary. I swear Dasiens Manga animations back then were better than this lol
misc.text: And before you start saying I am an ungrateful person: I’m not, I just want something more for the 10 years anniversary. I swear Dasiens Manga animations back then were better than this lol
